status_detail: 5 MW PEM electrolysis project in France by Hy2gen. Plug Power PEM electrolyzer (LOI signed December 2025). Producing green hydrogen for industrial customers in southern France. Supported by France's hydrogen strategy.

data_management.narrative_summary: Sunrhyse is a 5 MW green hydrogen production project in France developed by Hy2gen, a German developer of renewable hydrogen projects. A Letter of Intent was signed with Plug Power in December 2025 for a PEM electrolyzer system. The project will produce green hydrogen for industrial customers in southern France and is supported by France's national hydrogen strategy (SNH II). Hy2gen is also developing the larger H4 Marseille Fos project (GA-PR-016) in partnership with H2V Industry, and has secured EUR 47 million in funding for its project portfolio.

power.grid_connection_detail: Grid-connected with solar PPAs in southern France

offtake.offtaker_name: Local industrial customers in southern France

sources.title: Plug Power signs LOI with Hy2gen for 5MW PEM electrolyzer at Sunrhyse project — Dec 2025
sources.author: Plug Power / Hy2gen
